subcodes.first_line: The evident signs have appeared, and the verses have been sent down, yet the people comprehend not. The tokens have been made manifest, and the decree hath been fulfilled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتت البینات و نزلت الایات و القوم لایفقهون قد ظهرت العلامات و قضی
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
